content:
# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Overview

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

When to use:
- Need to upload image/video/pdf
- Upload button opens OS file picker
- Styled dropzone hides input
- Upload lives inside iframe

Inputs required:
- Absolute file path
- Expected accepted file types
- Upload success indicator
- Frame/dropzone locator

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Execution Steps

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- Verify file exists before upload.
- Prefer locator.setInputFiles on the actual input[type=file].
- If a file chooser opens, wait for page.waitForEvent('filechooser') then setFiles.
- For iframes, locate frame first then target the input inside it.
- After setting file, wait for filename/progress/success state.

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Commands or APIs

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- locator.setInputFiles(path)
- page.waitForEvent('filechooser')
- fileChooser.setFiles(path)
- frameLocator(...).locator('input[type=file]')

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Verification

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- Uploaded filename appears
- Progress reaches complete
- Submit/publish button becomes enabled
- Screenshot shows uploaded item

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Failure Modes

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- Targeting styled div instead of input
- Invalid Windows/Bash path
- Hidden input not connected
- Iframe context missed
- File type rejected

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Safety Notes

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- Do not click publish/submit after upload unless requested.
- Never upload private files without explicit path confirmation.

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.

# playwright-file-upload-patterns - Handoff Report

Automation type: file_upload
Tooling: Playwright, Windows paths
Goal: Upload files reliably through file inputs, file chooser events, iframe-aware locators, and upload verification.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/input

- File path used
- Upload method
- Success indicator
- Screenshot/log evidence

AI summary: For file upload, verify the path, target the real input[type=file] or filechooser, handle iframe context, then wait for filename/progress/success evidence.
